person.name: Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy

memoryArtifacts.headline: What memories do you have of your oldest relatives?

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Madog Fychan was a member of the family of Princes of Powys Fadog, though he never gained the title, being brother of Gruffydd Maelor II. He was an ally to Dafydd ap Llywelyn in his campaign to attack English possessions in Wales in 1245 and sided with Llywelyn ap Gruffydd in 1258 in his claim to the title of Prince of Wales. He died in December 1269.

Ancestry and Ambiguity
Some sources cite Madog Fychan ap Madog ap Gruffydd, also known as Madog Fychan, as the brother of Gruffydd Maelor II and grandson of Gruffydd Maelor I, Prince of Powys Fadog, existing c.1230–1269. Other genealogical tables insert another generation lower down with Madog Fychan as son of Madog Crypl (c. 1275–1304/6). However, it is more likely that Madog Crypl's son was Gruffydd, who was succeeded by Gruffydd Fychan II, the father of Owain Glyndŵr.

sourceList.title: Ancestry.com: Gruffudd Fychan Gruffudd in the U.S. and International Marriage Records, 1560-1900

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy於大約1280年出生在威爾士丹比爾盧阿邦時，他的父親Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan22歲，母親Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan19歲。他於1304年7月8日與Elizabeth le Strange在威爾士結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1365年在威爾士丹比爾格林-迪福德享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy于大约1280年出生在威尔士丹比爾盧阿邦时，他的父亲Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan22岁，母亲Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan19岁。他于1304年7月8日与Elizabeth le Strange在威尔士结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1365年在威尔士丹比爾格林-迪福德享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy was born about 1280, in Ruabon, Denbighshire, Wales, his father, Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan, was 22 and his mother, Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan, was 19. He married Elizabeth le Strange on 8 July 1304, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1365, in Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy est né environ 1280, à Ruabon, Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth le Strange le 8 juillet 1304, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1365, à Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy um 1280 in Ruabon, Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan 22 und seine Mutter Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan 19. Er hat am 8. Juli 1304 in Wales Elizabeth le Strange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1365 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Wales.

Lui sposato Elizabeth le Strange il 8 luglio 1304, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1365, nel Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Galles, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwyが約1280年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルアボンで生まれた時，父Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychanは22歳，母Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychanは19歳であった。1304年7月8日にウェールズでElizabeth le Strangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1365年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアグリン-ディフルドウイで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy(이)가 대략 1280년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루압에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1304년 7월 8일 웨일스에서 Elizabeth le Strange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1365년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 그리-디프르드w이에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Ruabon, Denbighshire, Gales, seu pai, Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth le Strange em 8 de julho de 1304, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1365, em Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Gales, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy родился около 1280 г. в местности руабон, денбаишир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth le Strange 8 июля 1304 г. в местности Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1365 г. в местности глин-дифрдви, денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffydd ap Madog of Glyndyfrdwy nació aproximadamente 1280, en Ruabon, Denbighshire, Gales, su papá, Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mrs. Madog Crupl ap Gruffydd Fychan, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth le Strange el 8 de julio de 1304, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1365, en Glyn-Dyfrdwy, Denbighshire, Gales, a la edad de 86 años.
